section_name: Distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plates
text:
* § 404-ee. Distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plates.

(1) Any person residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plate. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon the payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

(3) Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 96 (The World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund) and shall be used for scholarships awarded pursuant to sections six hundred eight and six hundred sixty-eight-d of the education law. * NB There are 4 § 404-ee’s

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14. Registration of Motor Vehicles
##### § 404-EE*3 — Distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plates

* § 404-ee. Distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plates.

(1) Any person residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plate. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

(2) A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon the payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

(3) Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 96 (The World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund) and shall be used for scholarships awarded pursuant to sections six hundred eight and six hundred sixty-eight-d of the education law. * NB There are 4 § 404-ee’s

*Last modified: Feb. 22, 2019*

subsections.text: * § 404-ee. Distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plates.

Any person residing in this state shall, upon request, be issued a distinctive “September eleventh, two thousand one remembrance” license plate. Application for said license plate shall be filed with the commissioner in such form and detail as the commissioner shall prescribe.

A distinctive plate issued pursuant to this section shall be issued in the same manner as other number plates upon the payment of the regular registration fee prescribed by section four hundred one of this article; provided, however, that an additional annual service charge of twenty-five dollars shall be charged for such plates.

Each twenty-five dollars received as the annual service charge under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the “World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund” established pursuant to State Finance Law § 96 (The World Trade Center memorial scholarship fund) and shall be used for scholarships awarded pursuant to sections six hundred eight and six hundred sixty-eight-d of the education law. * NB There are 4 § 404-ee’s
